metadata.name: Negotiate Annual Pricing with a Supplier

description: It's time for the annual price negotiation with a key supplier. A procurement manager must negotiate for better terms.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the total purchase volume with the supplier over the last year.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that purchase volume has increased by 20%.

nodes.task_description: Research market rates for the supplier's products to use as leverage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that competitors offer similar products at a lower price.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier and use the data to negotiate a 5% price reduction for the upcoming year.

expected_outcome.expected: The supplier agrees to the price reduction.

nodes.task_description: Update the pricing for the supplier's products in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the cost for all of the supplier's items.
